ventilation_crisis.title: Ventilation Crisis
ventilation_crisis.description: The village air is stale! Create N₂ (molecular nitrogen) in the Laboratory to fix the ventilation.
hints: Nitrogen makes up about 78% of Earth's atmosphere.
Try combining two nitrogen atoms (N + N).
Head to the Laboratory building.

water_of_life.title: Water of Life
water_of_life.description: The village well has dried up! Create H₂O in the Laboratory.
hints: Water is H₂O — two hydrogen and one oxygen.
First create H₂, then combine it with O.
You'll need to craft in two steps!

methane_harvest.title: Methane Harvest
methane_harvest.description: The new energy generator needs fuel! Synthesize CH₄ (methane) in the lab.
hints: Methane = 1 carbon + 4 hydrogen atoms.
CH₄ is the main component of natural gas.
Use C + H + H + H + H in the lab.

ammonia_synthesis.title: Ammonia Synthesis
ammonia_synthesis.description: We need fertilizer for the meadow crops! Synthesize NH₃ (ammonia) using the Haber process.
hints: Ammonia = 1 nitrogen + 3 hydrogen atoms.
NH₃ is pyramidal due to its lone electron pair.
This is how we make most of the world's fertilizer!

carbon_capture_1.title: Carbon Capture
carbon_capture_1.description: Too much CO₂ in the air! Craft CO₂ first, then show the Mayor the molecule so we can study how to capture it.
hints: CO₂ = 1 carbon + 2 oxygen atoms.
Carbon dioxide is what plants absorb during photosynthesis.
Craft it at the lab bench.

waste_crisis.title: Waste Crisis
waste_crisis.description: The Recycling Fields are overflowing with unsorted waste! Sort at least 3 items correctly in the sorting facility.
hints: Plastic goes in the yellow bin.
Glass is green, metal is silver.
Check the item description if you're unsure!

know_your_materials.title: Know Your Materials
know_your_materials.description: Before you can recycle efficiently, you need to identify materials correctly. Complete the material identification quiz with 100% accuracy.
hints: Read each item's description carefully.
When in doubt, think about what the item is made of.
Plastics float, metals are heavy and shiny.

circular_economy.title: Circular Economy
circular_economy.description: Prove that waste can become a resource! Craft 1 Eco Brick from recycled plastic and glass.
hints: First recycle plastic waste × 3 to get plastic pellets.
Then recycle glass waste × 3 to get glass cullet.
Combine them at the Materials Lab bench.

composite_creation.title: Composite Creation
composite_creation.description: Advanced materials can be made from everyday waste! Craft 1 Composite Wood Board and 1 Recycled Metal Ingot.
hints: Composite wood needs paper waste + organic waste.
Gather these from the resource nodes on the map.
The Materials Lab handles all composite crafting.

carbon_neutral.title: Carbon Neutral
carbon_neutral.description: Use the Climate Calculator to reduce EcoVille's carbon footprint by 50% in 10 actions or fewer.
hints: Solar Farms and Wind Turbines reduce CO₂ while boosting approval.
Carbon Tax is free but unpopular.
Reforestation is cheap and boosts public approval!

greenhouse_gases.title: Greenhouse Gases
greenhouse_gases.description: Study greenhouse gases firsthand! Craft CO₂ and CH₄, then capture the CO₂.
hints: You already know how to craft CO₂ and CH₄ from Atom Meadows.
To capture CO₂, combine a pollution sample with clean water.
Gather pollution samples from the vents around EcoVille.

clean_water_quest.title: Clean Water
clean_water_quest.description: EcoVille's water supply is contaminated! Filter 3 pollution samples into clean water.
hints: Activated carbon (charcoal) is the secret to water filtration.
Combine a pollution sample with C at the Climate Lab.
The water source springs on the east side are infinite!

renewable_shift.title: Renewable Shift
renewable_shift.description: Power EcoVille with clean energy! Craft 1 Solar Panel and 1 Biofuel.
hints: Solar panels need recycled plastic and glass from Recycling Fields.
Biofuel is made from organic waste + water.
These materials cross over from earlier maps — check your inventory!

sustainable_city.title: Sustainable City
sustainable_city.description: EcoVille is nearly carbon neutral! Earn the Green Certificate by completing all city initiatives.
hints: The Green Certificate is awarded automatically when all EcoVille quests are complete.
Make sure you've finished the Climate Calculator quest.
Check the Quest Log to see what's still pending.

split_the_light.title: Split the Light
split_the_light.description: The Prism Tower has gone dark! Solve light puzzle 1 in the Light Lab and craft a Rainbow Gem.
hints: A prism bends light by different amounts for different wavelengths.
White light + Prism = full spectrum!
Go to the Light Lab and use the puzzle terminal.

color_mixing.title: Color Mixing
color_mixing.description: Create secondary colors of light! Solve light puzzles 2 and 3 to mix colored light beams.
hints: Red + Green light = Yellow!
Blue + Green = Cyan, Red + Blue = Magenta.
In light mixing, combining colors makes brighter colors — opposite of pigments!

lens_creation.title: Lens Creation
lens_creation.description: The Observatory needs new lenses! Craft 1 Convex Lens at the Light Lab.
hints: Convex lenses need recycled glass from the Recycling Fields.
A prism shard is also needed — gather them from the crystal clusters.
Convex lenses make things appear larger by bending light inward.

invisible_spectrum.title: The Invisible Spectrum
invisible_spectrum.description: Beyond visible light lies the invisible spectrum! Solve light puzzle 4 and reveal hidden UV messages.
hints: Light exists beyond what we can see — infrared and ultraviolet.
You'll need your Convex Lens to complete puzzle 4.
Focus the beam through the lens to amplify its power!

rainbow_bridge.title: Rainbow Bridge
rainbow_bridge.description: Complete all 5 light puzzles to restore the Rainbow Bridge and unlock the path to Magnet Core!
hints: The final puzzle uses all optical components.
Plan your beam path before placing components.
Remember: mirrors reflect at 45°, splitters divide into 3 beams.

polar_attraction.title: Polar Attraction
polar_attraction.description: The Core's magnetic poles are out of alignment! Solve trajectory puzzle 1 and craft a Compass.
hints: Opposites attract — north and south poles pull each other.
A compass needle is just a tiny magnet!
Trajectory puzzle 1 has no magnets — just angle and velocity.

magnetic_fields.title: Magnetic Fields
magnetic_fields.description: Navigate the invisible magnetic field maze and craft an Electromagnet to power the Core.
hints: Your Compass reveals field lines — equip it!
Walking along field lines is faster than crossing them.
Electromagnets need steel alloy + copper wire.

field_art.title: Field Art
field_art.description: Create a beautiful magnetic field pattern by placing iron filings around magnets in the Core studio.
hints: Iron filings align along magnetic field lines.
North and south poles create beautiful curved patterns.
The field density shows where the force is strongest.

perfect_trajectory.title: Perfect Trajectory
perfect_trajectory.description: The launch cannon needs precise calibration! Solve trajectory puzzle 4 without missing, then craft the Propulsion Device.
hints: Remember: gravity always pulls down.
Magnets can redirect your projectile's path.
Try the preview trajectory line before firing — it shows your path!

core_stabilization.title: Core Stabilization
core_stabilization.description: The Magnet Core is destabilizing! Craft the Magnetic Shield and complete all trajectory puzzles to save it.
hints: The Magnetic Shield needs 2× steel alloy + north magnet + south magnet.
Steel alloy comes from metal waste + carbon in the Physics Lab.
Once you have the shield, bring it to Guardian Gauss at the Core!
